name: armsom
description: ArmSoM CM1 (RK3506J) module and CM1-IO carrier hardware reference. Bundles two skills (cm1, cm1-io) with pre-extracted schematic data: board-to-board connector pinouts, power trees, SoC voltage domains, per-peripheral net maps, and the CM1-IO 40-pin GPIO/FlexBUS header with Linux gpio numbers.
